objective: Build one registry-driven, append-only capture control plane that schedules exact list versions, preserves every attempt, resumes partial work, and executes content-hashed bounded recapture before TOPT Staging and larger universes depend on it.
claim_ceiling: E0 experimental capture-control contract, deterministic list expansion, append-only attempt ledger, checkpoint contract, and additive persistence schema only; no tiny replay evidence, stable handoff, source activation, default schedule, TOPT completeness, Staging operation, capacity, or data-readiness claim

requirements: queued D5 registration is merged and this preparation is based on main at 5c1721617acaaedf43245f3beccdefcb2182154e
the E0 repair replaces the pre-evidence alias corpus with canonical list-version and list-bound obligation identities at a40d2d15361b6e182a4ad7e379ba1ecb22c48f6b6726a27ba52c75c150e46361
the superseded preparation corpus is revoked before any E1 execution, protected result, or handoff consumption
the stable activation base remains 5c1721617acaaedf43245f3beccdefcb2182154e while E0 evidence records its exact current PR base and head
the E0 implementation starts from exact current main 5e1be12550ed8e7f8528f8017adffaa009a0ef40
the accepted D4 E2 Local/CI handoff remains unchanged and permits this batch
the accepted D2 E3 data-plane evidence remains unchanged
an independent reviewer is assigned before E0 acceptance
an active integration lease covers the additive migration before it changes
issue #205 contains this manifest path and exact SHA-256
Delivery Governance CI passes offline validation and live GitHub parity

dependencies.artifact: accepted D4 E2 Local/CI DataHub interface
accepted D2 E3 TOPT data-plane evidence

later_claim_dependencies: #60 accepted source policy, rights, cadence, and budget before any live-source or default-schedule claim
#61 accepted applicability, freshness, denominator, and SLO policy before thresholds or readiness freeze
D6-confidence-provenance consumes a stable D5 attempt and observation handoff before trusted confidence or indexed provenance claims
#171 consumes the accepted D5 E4 handoff before strengthened TOPT Staging capture claims
#206 consumes the accepted D5 E4 handoff before QQQ capacity evidence
#67 and #68 remain blocked until bounded scope, capacity, rights, and independent audit dependencies are accepted

corpus.environment: Local/CI checked-in capture-control fixtures through E2; immutable TOPT development denominator at E3; no live source before separately accepted policy and authorization
required_strata: one exact immutable list with success, unchanged, unavailable, skipped-policy, and explicit-failure obligations
two overlapping immutable lists whose separate obligations share one compatible provider work item
conditional response and identical raw bytes retained as a new attempt in a distinct capture cycle while reusing content-addressed raw bytes
bounded retry, interruption, rate limit, terminal failure, and out-of-order outcome sequences
crash after planning, raw landing, normalization, and partial manifest persistence with deterministic resume
content-hashed recapture dry runs filtered by list, subject, source, type, partition, time, failure, freshness, parser, mapping, and confidence state
recapture overreach rejection and proof that unaffected cells are not fetched or rewritten
TOPT 20 issuers, 21 instruments, and 84 obligations with GOOG and GOOGL kept distinct

source_ceiling: Checked-in fixtures through E2 and immutable development inputs through E3; live network calls, credentials, provider rights, default schedules, and Staging activation require separately accepted policy and authorization.

release_activation.reason: D5 remains isolated from root exports, global Dagster definitions, default schedules, source routes, and accepted release bindings until a separate fan-in transition is authorized.

commands: uv run --package truealpha-data-engine python -m pytest apps/data-engine/tests/datahub -q
uv run --package truealpha-contracts python -m ruff check libs/contracts/src/truealpha_contracts/capture_control.py libs/contracts/tests/test_capture_control.py
uv run --package truealpha-data-engine python -m ruff check apps/data-engine/src/data_engine/datahub apps/data-engine/tests/datahub
negative_controls: mutable latest/current list, source, schedule, parser, mapping, confidence, or recapture policy coordinate
campaign, run, obligation, work-item, attempt, raw-object, observation, plan, or checkpoint identity drift
identical raw bytes erase a later attempt, observation event, or separate list obligation
duplicate obligation, non-contiguous attempt, retry after terminal outcome, or unbounded retry
missing terminal state, denominator shrink, or aggregate-ratio substitution
resume duplicates logical work, loses an attempt, or repairs history with UPDATE or DELETE
recapture execution differs from its frozen dry-run selection, broadens a predicate, or rewrites an unaffected cell
GOOG and GOOGL collapse to one instrument or TOPT differs from 20 issuers, 21 instruments, and 84 obligations
source call before scope, policy, rights, budget, and call-plan authorization
root export, global Dagster definition, default schedule, Staging route, Production route, or release binding

allowed_evidence_readers: D6-confidence-provenance preparation after D5 E2 acceptance
issue #171 TOPT Staging preparation after D5 E4 acceptance
issue #206 QQQ capacity preparation after D5 E4 acceptance

invalidation: the revision-2 alias corpus is superseded before E1 and grants no evidence or handoff authority
identity grain, cadence semantics, terminal state, retry semantics, recapture predicate vocabulary, checkpoint semantics, or corpus change creates a new D5 revision
a D4 interface or D2 data-plane invalidation revokes dependent D5 evidence
a migration, threshold, source policy, catalog, universe, or denominator change invalidates the affected rung and every higher rung
shared export, global Dagster registration, default schedule, source activation, or release binding requires a separate integration lease and authorization
a code or policy change after E4 freeze creates a new candidate and requires fresh independent evidence
rollback: Revert the isolated D5 contracts, additive migration, runtime modules, tests, fixtures, evidence, handoff, and lease together; leave root exports, global Dagster definitions, source routes, schedules, release bindings, and prior append-only data untouched.
